categories.title: Foundation and task routing
categories.description: Small routing skills that prevent Codex from loading implementation knowledge before it knows the task, repository, and evidence requirements.

categories.title: Schema and research lookup
categories.description: Narrow research skills for CWTools, vanilla diffs, trigger/effect docs, and unresolved semantics.

categories.title: Script surfaces
categories.description: Implementation and validation skills for repeatable Paradox-script surfaces such as scripted triggers, effects, values, events, and on_actions.

categories.title: AI, economy, planets, and workforce
categories.description: AI economy and planet-development skills split by actual control surface.

categories.title: Gameplay domains
categories.description: Discrete gameplay-domain skills for technologies, empire setup, diplomacy, war, crises, and 4.x-specific concepts.

categories.title: Ships, warfare, and starbases
categories.description: Ship graph, component, behavior, fleet, starbase, and army skills kept separate from generic combat balance.

categories.title: Megastructures
categories.description: Megastructure implementation, AI planning, and high-power megastructure safety.

categories.title: UI, localization, and assets
categories.description: Player-facing text, GUI, sprites, resources, portraits, audio, map/system asset, and DDS pipeline skills.

categories.title: Validation and diagnostics
categories.description: Static validation, runtime-log review, active-playset inspection, observer testing, regression reports, and custom audit tooling.

categories.title: Active-stack compatibility
categories.description: Compatibility skills for major live-stack mods, separated from vanilla/schema skills.

categories.title: Packaging, release, and porting
categories.description: Release, Workshop, compatibility-patch, and version-porting workflow skills.

skills.purpose: Verify mod folder layout, outer .mod, inner descriptor.mod, path, supported_version, tags, thumbnail, and package-sensitive metadata.
skills.trigger: The mod does not appear in the launcher, is being packaged, moved, published, or version-bumped.
skills.do_not_use_when: Gameplay script, AI logic, UI layout, or balance is the main task.
skills.scope_control_notes: Stay limited to file placement and metadata; do not inspect game object definitions unless descriptor paths are wrong.

skills.purpose: Define safe naming conventions for object IDs, event namespaces, localization keys, flags, variables, and generated files.
skills.trigger: Creating new objects, events, loc keys, scripted values, flags, variables, or generated patch files.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only editing existing vanilla/mod IDs without introducing new keys.
skills.scope_control_notes: Naming only; do not include object-specific schema or balance.

skills.purpose: Identify the target mod, repo layout, task type, deliverable, target Stellaris version, and evidence requirements before loading topic skills.
skills.trigger: Any nontrivial Stellaris modding task starts, especially when files, compatibility, or validation may be involved.
skills.do_not_use_when: A one-line syntax answer or narrowly scoped localization typo is requested.
skills.scope_control_notes: Only classify and route; do not implement gameplay, validate schemas, or perform compatibility analysis.

skills.purpose: Provide minimal scope rules for ROOT/THIS/FROM/PREV, exists checks, trigger/effect placement, and common wrong-scope failure modes.
skills.trigger: Writing or reviewing events, on_actions, scripted triggers/effects, decisions, situations, or compatibility gates.
skills.do_not_use_when: Task is packaging, pure UI art, file listing, or non-script localization only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Keep to common scope patterns and pitfalls; do not become an encyclopedia of all triggers/effects.

skills.purpose: Map a requested change to the smallest relevant Stellaris file surface and likely validation chain.
skills.trigger: The user asks broadly to add/fix/change a feature and the agent must decide which skill or file family applies.
skills.do_not_use_when: The file path and surface are already explicit.
skills.scope_control_notes: Classification only; do not inspect every possible folder.

skills.purpose: Keep source lists, retrieval dates, confidence, caveats, and stale/dynamic-source warnings current for Codex handoffs.
skills.trigger: Adding new research references, mod pages, schema links, or evidence files to the project.
skills.do_not_use_when: Answering a direct implementation question where sources are already fresh and recorded.
skills.scope_control_notes: Inventory metadata only; do not summarize full source contents or make compatibility decisions.

skills.purpose: Choose which evidence types should decide the task: vanilla files, CWTools, generated docs, Irony, logs, runtime tests, mod pages, or old examples.
skills.trigger: Sources conflict, syntax is uncertain, a mod page disagrees with local files, or the task asks for research-backed work.
skills.do_not_use_when: The user explicitly names the authoritative source and no ambiguity remains.
skills.scope_control_notes: Produce a source plan only; do not implement or decide balance.

skills.purpose: Determine target Stellaris version, vanilla snapshot, DLC/beta assumptions, and whether a vanilla diff is required.
skills.trigger: The task mentions 4.x, patch porting, beta/stable mismatch, vanilla overrides, or compatibility with a live stack.
skills.do_not_use_when: The exact target version and vanilla snapshot are already provided and not relevant to the edit.
skills.scope_control_notes: Only establish baseline and risk; do not summarize all patch notes or perform the diff itself.

skills.purpose: Identify when CWTools can validate shape but cannot prove load-order winners, nested merge behavior, runtime scope semantics, or active-stack behavior.
skills.trigger: CWTools passes but the bug persists, or a public schema is intentionally incomplete.
skills.do_not_use_when: A schema error already explains the issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: Only decide what CWTools cannot answer; do not design the runtime test unless chained.

skills.purpose: Find the relevant CWTools CWT rule path and summarize allowed shape, scope, and known schema gaps for one folder/object type.
skills.trigger: Allowed keys, scopes, object types, or path names are uncertain.
skills.do_not_use_when: Runtime behavior, active load-order winner, or game logic semantics is the question.
skills.scope_control_notes: One folder/object family per call; do not explain all CWTools or all Stellaris script.

skills.purpose: Locate, generate, or refresh local trigger/effect/modifier/script documentation and record what version it represents.
skills.trigger: A command, modifier, or effect may differ between versions, or local docs need to be refreshed.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task only needs CWTools structural schema or active mod conflicts.
skills.scope_control_notes: Inventory and freshness only; do not interpret every command.

skills.purpose: Investigate whether a specific surface merges, appends, replaces, de-duplicates, or has duplicate-ID ambiguity.
skills.trigger: Duplicate object IDs, nested blocks, on_actions, economic subplans, localization replace behavior, or load-order surprises are suspected.
skills.do_not_use_when: A simple unique additive file is being created.
skills.scope_control_notes: One object type and one merge question per task.

skills.purpose: Build a narrow inventory of IDs for one object family across vanilla and enabled mods.
skills.trigger: The agent must ensure IDs exist, avoid collisions, or validate references.
skills.do_not_use_when: The user gives exact IDs and only asks for formatting.
skills.scope_control_notes: Inventory only; do not resolve conflicts or change files.

skills.purpose: Verify exact trigger/effect names, parameter forms, scope expectations, and generated-doc freshness before using them.
skills.trigger: A task uses unfamiliar triggers/effects or old examples.
skills.do_not_use_when: The exact command is proven in current vanilla examples and the task does not need scope validation.
skills.scope_control_notes: Only validate requested commands; do not catalog all triggers/effects.

skills.purpose: Compare a modded or copied object against the target vanilla version to detect stale keys, deleted blocks, new requirements, and full-file override risk.
skills.trigger: Porting, overriding vanilla objects, or troubleshooting after a Stellaris patch.
skills.do_not_use_when: The mod only adds unique new IDs and no vanilla object is copied or replaced.
skills.scope_control_notes: One folder or object family at a time; do not become a general patch-note review.

skills.purpose: List full-file and object-level vanilla overrides in a mod and rank porting/compatibility risk.
skills.trigger: A mod copies vanilla files or fails after a patch, or release notes mention touched surfaces.
skills.do_not_use_when: The mod is purely additive with namespaced IDs.
skills.scope_control_notes: Audit only; do not implement fixes.

skills.purpose: Implement and validate decisions with cost, allow/potential, effects, AI weights, cooldowns, localization, and save-safety notes.
skills.trigger: A task adds planet or country decisions, edict-like buttons, or manual player/AI actions.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task is a policy/edict or event-only feature.
skills.scope_control_notes: Decisions only; do not include policies, edicts, or situations.

skills.purpose: Author country/planet/fleet/ship events with namespaces, triggers, immediate blocks, options, and localization hooks.
skills.trigger: A feature needs an event chain, UI option, notification, cleanup, or scripted workflow.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only registering events in on_actions or only writing localization text.
skills.scope_control_notes: One event namespace/workflow per use; delegate on_actions and validation.

skills.purpose: Validate event IDs, namespaces, is_triggered_only, scope transitions, options, localization, and runtime errors.
skills.trigger: Reviewing generated or patched events, logs mention events, or an event fires incorrectly.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task is pure event concept design without files.
skills.scope_control_notes: Do not redesign event content unless validation identifies the failure.

skills.purpose: Manage persistent state using flags, variables, event targets, cooldowns, and cleanup rules.
skills.trigger: Event chains need memory, cooldowns, per-country/planet state, or target retention.
skills.do_not_use_when: The workflow is stateless and one-shot.
skills.scope_control_notes: State lifecycle only; no full event-chain design.

skills.purpose: Attach events/effects to game hooks and pulses with minimal frequency, correct scope assumptions, and safe registration.
skills.trigger: Startup, monthly/yearly hooks, pulse events, or hook-based compatibility logic is needed.
skills.do_not_use_when: The event is manual/debug-only and does not need automatic triggering.
skills.scope_control_notes: Hook selection and structure only; event body design is separate.

skills.purpose: Check duplicate IDs, nested event/random_event ambiguity, pulse frequency, merge winners, and runtime proof needs.
skills.trigger: Existing on_action behavior is unclear, duplicates are present, or a mod stack changes on_actions.
skills.do_not_use_when: Writing a fresh event body before hook choice.
skills.scope_control_notes: Validation only; do not implement new gameplay here.

skills.purpose: Prevent daily/monthly/yearly pulses and galaxy-wide loops from over-scanning or over-firing.
skills.trigger: Any frequent on_action, pulse event, every_country/planet loop, or observer-run performance problem.
skills.do_not_use_when: Static data definitions with no runtime loops.
skills.scope_control_notes: Performance guards/caps only; no balance tuning.

skills.purpose: Create or review reusable effects with safe scope guards, clear side effects, cleanup, and namespaced IDs.
skills.trigger: Repeated effect logic, setup/cleanup actions, catch-up scripts, or compatibility repairs are needed.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task only needs a boolean condition or numeric formula.
skills.scope_control_notes: Require explicit scope and side-effect boundary; do not design whole event chains.

skills.purpose: Create or review reusable boolean conditions with explicit scopes, safe exists checks, and namespaced IDs.
skills.trigger: Conditions repeat across files, compatibility gates are needed, or trigger logic needs reuse.
skills.do_not_use_when: A one-off inline condition is clearer or numeric output is required.
skills.scope_control_notes: Boolean conditions only; do not cover scripted effects or scripted values except references.

skills.purpose: Design reusable numeric formulas, constants, and AI weights without embedding large logic in other objects.
skills.trigger: Costs, scores, scaling factors, AI weights, or thresholds repeat.
skills.do_not_use_when: Static literals are clearer or boolean logic is needed.
skills.scope_control_notes: Numeric expressions only; no event bodies or triggers beyond formula guards.

skills.purpose: Implement or validate situations, situation stages/approaches, scripted actions, automation blocks, and version-gated 4.4/4.5 syntax.
skills.trigger: A task touches situations, Situation Log UI, automation buttons, or scripted action menus.
skills.do_not_use_when: A simple event or edict can solve the problem without situation machinery.
skills.scope_control_notes: Keep situations/actions together only where they share UI automation; split if it grows.

skills.purpose: Add or validate special projects, anomalies, archaeology-style chains, requirements, rewards, and localization.
skills.trigger: A task adds exploration/research chains or special project outcomes.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task is a normal country/planet event with no project/anomaly UI.
skills.scope_control_notes: Exploration project surfaces only; no general event guide.

skills.purpose: Adjust AI spending categories, desired min/max, upkeep/expenditure types, and resource partitioning.
skills.trigger: AI has resources but does not spend enough on construction, fleets, starbases, edicts, or strategic resources.
skills.do_not_use_when: Candidate visibility or economic plan targets are wrong.
skills.scope_control_notes: Budgets only; no economic-plan targets or object AI weights.

skills.purpose: Plan AI-only emergency catch-up events for severe unemployment/housing/job deficits when normal planning is too slow, with save-safety and semantic tests.
skills.trigger: Late-game AI colonies have large unemployment/stockpiles and vanilla plan/budget tuning cannot clear the backlog.
skills.do_not_use_when: Normal economic plans/budgets/zone metadata have not been tried or the goal is vanilla-pure AI behavior.
skills.scope_control_notes: Emergency intervention only; do not replace normal AI economy or assume add_building semantics without tests.

skills.purpose: Tune global AI construction thresholds, free-job caps, scoring multipliers, target expiry, and underdeveloped-planet knobs cautiously.
skills.trigger: A controlled experiment needs global construction behavior changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Per-building AI visibility, zones, or budgets are the real issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: One define family per experiment; require before/after metrics.

skills.purpose: Tune AI personalities, aggression, diplomacy, expansion, research/military tendencies, and compatibility with strategy routes.
skills.trigger: AI personality files or empire behavior style is part of the task.
skills.do_not_use_when: The issue is economic plan, tech weight, or fleet design syntax.
skills.scope_control_notes: Personality-level behavior only; do not edit every AI control surface.

skills.purpose: Review colony automation categories, priority districts/zones, buildings, availability, and AI planet behavior hooks.
skills.trigger: common/colony_automation or automation-like planet queues are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task edits building definitions only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Automation definitions only; no full AI economy tuning.

skills.purpose: Handle unresolved colony_automation_exception schema by finding vanilla/mod examples and designing minimal parser/runtime tests.
skills.trigger: A task touches common/colony_automation_exception or CWTools cannot validate its body.
skills.do_not_use_when: No colony_automation_exception files are involved.
skills.scope_control_notes: Research unknown fields only; do not design colony automation generally.

skills.purpose: Add or validate colony type weights, designation modifiers, AI resource conversion, and specialization alignment.
skills.trigger: Planet designation, colony_type, automation specialization, or AI planet role logic changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only district/building stats or UI text are edited.
skills.scope_control_notes: Designations only; delegate zones, buildings, and jobs.

skills.purpose: Add or repair districts/buildings, resources, potential/allow, upgrades, on_queued/on_built hooks, AI weights, and zone metadata.
skills.trigger: District/building definitions, upgrades, build restrictions, or job-producing structures are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only jobs, resource categories, or UI layout change.
skills.scope_control_notes: One object family per task; avoid economic-plan tuning here.

skills.purpose: Tune or add economic plans/subplans for AI income, focus, pops, empire size, naval cap, scaling, and phase-specific priorities.
skills.trigger: AI economy goals, construction pressure, research scaling, or plan subtargets need change.
skills.do_not_use_when: Missing building eligibility, zone metadata, or budget category is the actual issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: Economic plans only; do not edit buildings, budgets, or defines in this skill.

skills.purpose: Reconstruct active economic plans/subplans and identify final winners, duplicate subplan overwrites, and load-order-dependent behavior.
skills.trigger: A heavy playset or AI overhaul makes plan behavior unclear.
skills.do_not_use_when: Single clean local mod with no external plan overrides.
skills.scope_control_notes: Report winners and conflicts only; do not retune values.

skills.purpose: Define jobs, strata/categories, resources, upkeep/output, modifiers, unemployment implications, and AI-visible job output.
skills.trigger: New jobs, job-producing buildings, pop economy bugs, or unemployment fixes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only building placement or designation weights change.
skills.scope_control_notes: Jobs/pop outputs only; not whole AI economy.

skills.purpose: Handle 4.x pop groups, workforce assignment, job efficiency, pop-count assumptions, and compatibility with old scripts/UI.
skills.trigger: Scripts, UI, or AI logic refers to pops, jobs, workforce, species integration, or pop counts after 4.0.
skills.do_not_use_when: The task is a pre-4.0 historical mod review only.
skills.scope_control_notes: 4.x pop/workforce semantics only; no general job design.

skills.purpose: Manage strategic resources, economic categories, modifier keys, AI recognition, resource groups, and universal-patch dependencies.
skills.trigger: New resources, missing resource display, modifier categories, or strategic-resource AI output are involved.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only vanilla resources are used and no modifier categories change.
skills.scope_control_notes: Data/modifier semantics only; delegate UI layout to UI skills.

skills.purpose: Implement or validate 4.x zones, zone sets, slot unlocks, building-set includes/excludes, conversion, AI priority, and UI visibility dependencies.
skills.trigger: common/zones, common/zone_slots, planet view, or 4.x building-slot behavior is touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: Pre-4.x district-only logic or pure building stat edits.
skills.scope_control_notes: Zones/slots only; do not cover all buildings or planet economy.

skills.purpose: Implement empire setup content including civics, origins, authorities, governments, start effects, and scripted gates.
skills.trigger: Empire creation, origin events, or government/civic availability changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Midgame events, policies, or diplomacy changes only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Empire-creation surfaces only; do not include policies or traditions.

skills.purpose: Plan AI responses to vanilla and modded crises, fallen/awakened empires, total-war threats, and emergency economy/fleet posture.
skills.trigger: Crisis-tier threats or late-game survival behavior is the task.
skills.do_not_use_when: Normal early/midgame economy tuning.
skills.scope_control_notes: Crisis response only; no generic AI overhaul.

skills.purpose: Tune diplomatic actions, subject contracts, federations, pacts, war joining, and coalition logic.
skills.trigger: Diplomacy, subject, federation, research pact, or contract behavior changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Pure event flavor text with no diplomatic mechanics.
skills.scope_control_notes: Diplomatic control surfaces only; no broad empire AI overhaul.

skills.purpose: Implement or validate operations, intel categories, spy networks, infiltration effects, and AI weights.
skills.trigger: Espionage, intel, covert operations, or information-gathering mechanics are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Diplomacy or war changes do not touch intel/operations.
skills.scope_control_notes: Espionage/intel only; no general diplomacy.

skills.purpose: Patch leaders, traits, council positions, agendas, and leader UI/localization assumptions.
skills.trigger: Leader traits, council roles, agendas, or leader events are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: Empire civics/origins only with no leader mechanics.
skills.scope_control_notes: Leader/council surfaces only.

skills.purpose: Handle 4.4 Nomad/Arkship/Wayline assumptions around colonies, carriers, contracts, resources, UI panels, and war/diplomacy interactions.
skills.trigger: A task touches colonies/capital assumptions, contracts, Waystations, Arkships, or 4.4 Nomad compatibility.
skills.do_not_use_when: Target version is pre-4.4 or the feature never interacts with colonies/country ownership.
skills.scope_control_notes: 4.4 Nomad-specific assumptions only; no broad diplomacy or economy guide.

skills.purpose: Implement policies/edicts with availability, AI weights, resources, cooldowns, and safe effects.
skills.trigger: Policy/edict definitions, AI opening choices, or resource campaigns are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Static modifiers or economic plans only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Policies/edicts only; do not tune whole economy.

skills.purpose: Tune AI research choices, prerequisite paths, doctrine lanes, and avoiding incoherent sidegrades.
skills.trigger: AI should prefer specific tech routes, fleet doctrines, megastructures, or economy tech.
skills.do_not_use_when: Tech object syntax or prerequisites are invalid.
skills.scope_control_notes: AI weighting only; no tech creation or fleet component syntax.

skills.purpose: Implement technologies, prerequisites, categories, feature flags, unlocks, tiers, rare weights, and localization.
skills.trigger: Adding/editing techs or tech unlocks.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only AI research preference is changing.
skills.scope_control_notes: Tech object structure only; no full component or tradition design.

skills.purpose: Add or patch traditions, ascension perks, adoption/finish effects, unlocks, and UI-safe localization.
skills.trigger: Tradition tree, ascension perk, or perk unlock behavior changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only tech, civic, or event logic changes.
skills.scope_control_notes: Tradition/AP logic only; UI layout is delegated.

skills.purpose: Implement or validate war goals, casus belli, claims, peace effects, total-war gates, and AI war weights.
skills.trigger: New war types, CB changes, claims, or conquest logic.
skills.do_not_use_when: Ship components, sections, or fleet design are the main issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: War/CB mechanics only; not ship combat.

skills.purpose: Modify army types, bombardment, invasion logic, transport behavior, recruitment, and AI weights.
skills.trigger: Ground combat, assault armies, bombardment, or invasion AI changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Ship combat or war goals only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Armies/invasion only; no total war or ship combat.

skills.purpose: Validate component templates, slot templates, component sets, prerequisites, restrictions, resources, and AI-use metadata.
skills.trigger: Weapons, utilities, reactors, components, or component slots/sets are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Section geometry or ship-size definitions are the issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: Component graph only; no broad combat balance.

skills.purpose: Tie ship designs, tech weights, budget pressure, aggression, threat response, and doctrine specialization into coherent AI fleet behavior.
skills.trigger: AI fleet composition, military strategy, doctrine, or research route coherence is the task.
skills.do_not_use_when: Low-level section/component syntax is failing.
skills.scope_control_notes: Doctrine-level only; delegate file syntax and graph validation.

skills.purpose: Assess fleet manager templates, reinforcement behavior, transport/fleet creation, and AI replenishment issues.
skills.trigger: Fleets fail to reinforce, templates are invalid, or AI cannot maintain intended ship classes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Ship designer definitions are invalid before fleet manager is reached.
skills.scope_control_notes: Reinforcement behavior only; no component graph validation unless chained.

skills.purpose: Check AI/default/global designs against sections, slots, required components, tech availability, and save/design validity.
skills.trigger: AI ship designs fail, designs have empty slots, or modded ship classes need defaults.
skills.do_not_use_when: Player-only cosmetic shipset changes.
skills.scope_control_notes: Validation-heavy; implement only direct global design fixes.

skills.purpose: Implement or validate combat computers, ship behaviors, ranges, class restrictions, and AI-use metadata.
skills.trigger: New behaviors, combat computers, SFT compatibility, or combat stance bugs.
skills.do_not_use_when: Components have no behavior/computer change.
skills.scope_control_notes: Behavior/computer only; not all fleet strategy.

skills.purpose: Run a static graph validation of ship sizes, sections, component slots, component sets, behaviors, global designs, and required components.
skills.trigger: Multiple ship/component mods are active or a ship designer/save failure is suspected.
skills.do_not_use_when: A single vanilla component stat is changed.
skills.scope_control_notes: Validation graph only; do not retune ship balance.

skills.purpose: Validate/edit ship sizes, section slots, fits_on_slot graph, class restrictions, ship designer assumptions, and section geometry references.
skills.trigger: common/ship_sizes or common/section_templates changes, or NSC/SFT section issues.
skills.do_not_use_when: Component stat edits only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Sizes/sections graph only; no components or combat balance.

skills.purpose: Implement and validate starbase levels, modules, buildings, ship-size files, orbital rings, UI slots, and cooldown effects.
skills.trigger: Starbase modules/buildings/levels, orbital rings, or starbase UI/ship-size compatibility are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: Combat ship components or fleet designs only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Starbase/orbital-ring surfaces only; not fleet ships.

skills.purpose: Assess high-power megastructure effects, crises, menus, resources, scripted triggers, vanilla overwrites, and save/runtime risks.
skills.trigger: Gigas or Gigas-like megastructure content is present, or megastructure changes are high-power.
skills.do_not_use_when: Small vanilla megastructure text or cost tweak.
skills.scope_control_notes: Risk map only; delegate implementation and UI patching.

skills.purpose: Make AI recognize, afford, prioritize, and sequence megastructures through tech, economy, budgets, and events.
skills.trigger: AI should build megastructures more intelligently or sooner.
skills.do_not_use_when: Player-only megastructure flavor or UI text.
skills.scope_control_notes: Planning only; megastructure syntax is separate.

skills.purpose: Check megastructure menus, buttons, icons, topbar resources, Situation Log links, and UI patch interactions.
skills.trigger: Megastructure UI, Gigas menu, resource display, or construction UI breaks.
skills.do_not_use_when: Megastructure script definitions are valid and UI is untouched.
skills.scope_control_notes: UI/menu only; no megastructure gameplay.

skills.purpose: Add or patch megastructure stages, placement rules, build/upgrade logic, resources, events, and localization.
skills.trigger: Vanilla/custom megastructure definitions or stages are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Gigas-specific compatibility or AI planning only.
skills.scope_control_notes: One megastructure family per use; no Gigas compatibility deep dive.

skills.purpose: Check image formats, sizes, compression, mipmaps, alpha, and predictable asset export conventions.
skills.trigger: Creating or fixing DDS icons, event pictures, portraits, flags, or UI images.
skills.do_not_use_when: The issue is a missing spriteType path, not image encoding.
skills.scope_control_notes: Image pipeline only; do not edit .gfx layout beyond path references.

skills.purpose: Add music, advisor, sound events, ambient sounds, and asset references.
skills.trigger: Audio/music/advisor content is requested or sound logs fail.
skills.do_not_use_when: Event text, icons, or UI only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Audio/music only; no gameplay scripting.

skills.purpose: Validate entity, mesh, animation, shader, and graphical culture references for shipsets, portraits, and space objects.
skills.trigger: 3D models, shipsets, entity errors, or graphical culture assets are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: 2D icons or GUI layout only.
skills.scope_control_notes: 3D asset references only; no gameplay definitions unless needed for asset linkage.

skills.purpose: Add spriteTypes, icons, DDS/TGA assets, atlas paths, and icon references for resources, components, techs, and UI.
skills.trigger: Missing icons, new resources/components/tech icons, or spriteType errors.
skills.do_not_use_when: Panel layout or localization is wrong.
skills.scope_control_notes: 2D sprite/icon references only; no portraits or 3D entities.

skills.purpose: Edit or validate .gui/.gfx layout files, panels, topbar, planet view, ship designer, outliner, and compatibility patch ordering.
skills.trigger: UI breaks, new resources are not visible, or planet/starbase/ship UI files are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only localization text or icons are missing.
skills.scope_control_notes: Layout only; delegate resource semantics and icons.

skills.purpose: Add, validate, and troubleshoot localization yml keys, language headers, encoding, missing loc, duplicate keys, and dynamic loc references.
skills.trigger: Any player-facing text, event text, UI label, tech name, tooltip, or missing localization appears.
skills.do_not_use_when: No text or localization keys change.
skills.scope_control_notes: Text keys only; no UI layout or icon work.

skills.purpose: Add system initializers, star classes, deposits, blockers, galaxy visuals, and system/space object asset references.
skills.trigger: Galaxy generation, starting systems, star classes, deposits, blockers, or system visuals are edited.
skills.do_not_use_when: Planet economy or UI only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Map/system setup only; no general planet economy.

skills.purpose: Add species classes, portraits, name lists, city/room assets, flags, and related localization.
skills.trigger: Species, portraits, city sets, rooms, names, or cosmetic empire setup content changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Gameplay-only AI/economy changes.
skills.scope_control_notes: Cosmetic species work only; no AI or economy.

skills.purpose: Patch resource groups/topbar visibility and ordering for new strategic resources and universal resource patches.
skills.trigger: New resource is hidden, topbar breaks, or URP/interface/resource_groups conflicts appear.
skills.do_not_use_when: Resource economics/modifiers are the only issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: Resource display only; no economic-category semantics.

skills.purpose: Read/produce enabled mods, Workshop IDs, descriptors, paths, versions, and load order for the active playset.
skills.trigger: Any compatibility, load-order, mod-stack, or active-save task begins.
skills.do_not_use_when: A single local mod is tested in a clean environment.
skills.scope_control_notes: Inventory only; do not solve conflicts.

skills.purpose: Design small local Python/Codex helper scripts to emit mods.json, overwritten_paths, object inventories, load_order, and validation inputs.
skills.trigger: Existing tools leave gaps in playset, freshness, conflict, or ID inventory workflows.
skills.do_not_use_when: A one-off manual check is sufficient.
skills.scope_control_notes: Tool adapter only; do not bake gameplay rules into scripts.

skills.purpose: Run/read CWTools diagnostics and map warnings/errors to files, object families, and likely follow-up skills.
skills.trigger: Static validation is requested or code generation has produced Stellaris script.
skills.do_not_use_when: Runtime-only bug with clean static diagnostics.
skills.scope_control_notes: Diagnostics triage only; no broad refactor.

skills.purpose: Read error.log, game.log, script.log, localization logs, and crash folders to map runtime errors to script surfaces.
skills.trigger: Game launches but content fails, missing loc appears, events do not fire, UI errors occur, or parser errors appear.
skills.do_not_use_when: Static pre-launch validation only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Log-to-cause mapping only; avoid redesign unless chained.

skills.purpose: Validate deterministic generator outputs, expected files, diff cleanliness, static checks, and known manual-runtime questions.
skills.trigger: Codex modifies generators or generated Stellaris mod artifacts.
skills.do_not_use_when: Hand-edited small file with no generator.
skills.scope_control_notes: Generated artifact checks only; no gameplay design.

skills.purpose: Use Irony merged/conflict output to identify file/object winners, FIOS/LIOS behavior, and candidate patch targets.
skills.trigger: A mod conflict, overwritten object, UI winner, or load-order problem is suspected.
skills.do_not_use_when: A schema error in one local file explains the issue.
skills.scope_control_notes: Analysis only; patch authoring is separate.

skills.purpose: Apply maintainer-stated ordering rules and general Stellaris overwrite expectations before or alongside Irony verification.
skills.trigger: User asks where a mod/patch should load or a mod page gives specific load-order instructions.
skills.do_not_use_when: Need exact merged winners; use Irony instead.
skills.scope_control_notes: Rules summary only; do not diff files.

skills.purpose: Plan safe observer runs with metrics, interval checks, copied saves, stop criteria, and comparison notes.
skills.trigger: AI behavior, economy, war, crisis, or performance changes need validation.
skills.do_not_use_when: One-shot syntax or UI visibility check.
skills.scope_control_notes: Test plan only; do not claim results without evidence.

skills.purpose: Define counters/logging for pulses, queues, economy, unemployment, fleets, script cost, and observer-run performance.
skills.trigger: Pulse scripts, AI changes, observer runs, or lag concerns.
skills.do_not_use_when: Static data-only content with no runtime loop.
skills.scope_control_notes: Metrics only; no balance tuning.

skills.purpose: Produce a compact before/after report listing files touched, diagnostics run, runtime results, unresolved questions, and next test.
skills.trigger: Finishing a coding pass, patch, port, or compatibility investigation.
skills.do_not_use_when: User only asks for a code snippet or a quick answer.
skills.scope_control_notes: Report only; do not perform new investigation.

skills.purpose: Design minimal new-game/console/copied-save tests for one feature with pass/fail signals and log checks.
skills.trigger: Static tools cannot prove semantics, UI visibility, or runtime behavior.
skills.do_not_use_when: Pure schema validation is enough.
skills.scope_control_notes: One scenario only; not a long observer simulation.

skills.purpose: Assess whether a change is save-safe, new-game-only, copied-save-only, or requires migration/cleanup.
skills.trigger: Events, buildings, megastructures, ship classes, defines, or patches affect existing saves.
skills.do_not_use_when: Pure documentation or typo fix.
skills.scope_control_notes: Risk classification only; no implementation.

skills.purpose: Define a minimal UI panel checklist for planet view, ship designer, topbar, outliner, diplomacy, situations, and save/reload checks.
skills.trigger: UIOD, interface files, resources, zones, ships, or topbar changes are involved.
skills.do_not_use_when: Non-UI script changes only.
skills.scope_control_notes: UI test checklist only; no GUI patching.

skills.purpose: Check ESC components, reactors, weapon progression, global designs, techs, icons, and NSC3 ordering assumptions.
skills.trigger: ESC NEXT is active or components/global designs/tech progression are changed.
skills.do_not_use_when: Ship sections only with no ESC.
skills.scope_control_notes: ESC component/design scope only.

skills.purpose: Confirm exact workshop identity, then check starbase ship size, levels, modules, UI slots, UMP/UIOD dependencies, and NSC incompatibilities.
skills.trigger: Starbase Extended-style mod is active or starbase files are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: Vanilla-only starbase module tweak.
skills.scope_control_notes: Do not assume Starbase Extended equals Expanded Starbases; identity check comes first.

skills.purpose: Check Gigas megastructures, resources, UI patches, crises, on_actions, scripted triggers, vanilla overwrites, and patch order.
skills.trigger: Gigas is active or the task touches megastructures, resources, topbar UI, crises, or scripted triggers.
skills.do_not_use_when: No Gigas/Gigas-like mod is present.
skills.scope_control_notes: Compatibility only; not a Gigas design guide.

skills.purpose: Check planet modifiers, deposits, events, PD/Gigas/Real Space interactions, and planet generation hooks for Guilli-style planet modifier mods.
skills.trigger: Guilli’s Planet Modifiers or a similar planet-modifier mod is active with planet/zone/deposit changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: No planet modifier/deposit/event interaction.
skills.scope_control_notes: Planet modifier compatibility only; no generic planet economy.

skills.purpose: Check NSC3 ship sizes, section files, starbase interactions, bioships, global designs, UIOD dependency, and save warnings.
skills.trigger: NSC3 is active or ship/starbase files are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: Vanilla-only ship mod with no NSC3 active.
skills.scope_control_notes: NSC3-specific deltas only; no generic ship overhaul guide.

skills.purpose: Check planet classes, startup events, zones, zone slots, districts, colony types, deposits, and UIOD/planet-view patch interactions.
skills.trigger: PD is active or planet/zones/UI/planet class files are touched.
skills.do_not_use_when: No PD or planet-class changes.
skills.scope_control_notes: PD compatibility only; do not design new planet classes broadly.

skills.purpose: Check Real Space modules, system scale, galaxy generation, visual assets, megastructure geometry, and bottom-load-order guidance.
skills.trigger: Real Space or similar galaxy-scale/visual overhaul is active, especially with Gigas.
skills.do_not_use_when: No galaxy/visual/system-scale mod is active.
skills.scope_control_notes: Real Space-specific compatibility only.

skills.purpose: Validate final merged NSC3 + ESC NEXT + Spacefleet Tactica graph for sizes, sections, slots, components, behaviors, and global designs.
skills.trigger: Multiple ship/component/behavior mods are active.
skills.do_not_use_when: Only one small vanilla ship tweak.
skills.scope_control_notes: Composite validation only; fixes require chained implementation skills.

skills.purpose: Check SFT ship behavior AI, sections, combat computers, NSC/ESC/Gigas add-on rules, and AI design effects.
skills.trigger: SFT is active or ship behavior/design AI changes.
skills.do_not_use_when: Components have no behavior/design changes and SFT is absent.
skills.scope_control_notes: SFT integration only; not all combat balance.

skills.purpose: Compare AI economy, research, budgets, jobs, buildings, zones, colony types, personalities, and load-order assumptions against Stellar AI.
skills.trigger: Stellar AI is active or AI economy/planet definitions are changed.
skills.do_not_use_when: No AI overhaul or same-definition overlap.
skills.scope_control_notes: Compatibility against Stellar AI only; no generic AI rewrite.

skills.purpose: Keep total conversions isolated and check version, UI, resource, and compatibility statements before mixing with vanilla+ stacks.
skills.trigger: STNC, STNH, LoToR, New Dawn, or another total conversion is considered.
skills.do_not_use_when: Normal vanilla+ compatibility patching with no total conversion.
skills.scope_control_notes: Playset isolation and risk only; not a total-conversion modding guide.

skills.purpose: Check UIOD load order, compatibility patches, planet view, ship designer, topbar/resource groups, outliner, and final UI winners.
skills.trigger: UIOD is active or interface files are changed.
skills.do_not_use_when: Non-UI gameplay scripts only.
skills.scope_control_notes: UIOD-specific; not generic UI authoring.

skills.purpose: Check Universal Resource Patch and Universal Modifier Patch interactions, resource topbar display, economy categories, and dependencies.
skills.trigger: New resources/modifiers, URP, UMP, or Expanded Starbases-style dependency is present.
skills.do_not_use_when: Vanilla-only resources and no universal patches.
skills.scope_control_notes: Universal patch surfaces only; do not redesign resource economy.

skills.purpose: Create minimal patch-mod plans that override only necessary objects and document load-order assumptions.
skills.trigger: Two or more mods conflict and a patch is required.
skills.do_not_use_when: Simple load-order change solves the issue or conflict winner is unknown.
skills.scope_control_notes: Patch only the conflict; avoid bundled broad fixes.

skills.purpose: Prepare local release structure, descriptor metadata, supported version, changelog, artifacts, and release checklist.
skills.trigger: Release, sharing, local package test, or descriptor update.
skills.do_not_use_when: Internal code review only.
skills.scope_control_notes: Release metadata only; no gameplay implementation.

skills.purpose: Build a porting checklist from vanilla diff, deprecated keys, patch notes, schema changes, save risk, and regression saves.
skills.trigger: Stellaris patch update, beta branch, or version bump.
skills.do_not_use_when: No target game-version change.
skills.scope_control_notes: One source/target version pair only.

skills.purpose: Define clean/active-stack/beta save tests, UI checks, static validation, and pass/fail criteria for release readiness.
skills.trigger: Before public release, version bump, or major compatibility patch.
skills.do_not_use_when: Tiny internal-only code experiment.
skills.scope_control_notes: Test matrix only; do not run tests or fix bugs.

skills.purpose: Plan Workshop upload/update metadata, description, thumbnail, visibility, dependencies, tags, and change-note discipline.
skills.trigger: Publishing or updating on Steam Workshop.
skills.do_not_use_when: Local-only test mod.
skills.scope_control_notes: Workshop operations only; no gameplay code.
